productDisplayName: Quechua Forclaz Large  Backpack - 50 ltr Orange
description: 1. Capacity: 61 litres 2. Adjustable and designed for comfort with a ventilated mesh back 3. Easy to carry 4. Comes with compression straps, chest strap, tensioners, hand rests 5.  Ample storage space with pockets provided - 1 inner, 3 outer, 1 on belt This extra-large sized quechua backpack is a perfect excuse to put it all in one bag and shoot off on that unplanned but the most welcome trip! It's designed to endure harsh conditions encountered in outdoor adventure Sports like trekking or travelling over several days. The accessible bottom of the backpack, multiple compartments and pockets, adjustable straps and dry-Fit cushioned back make the FORCLAZ  Blue - Large - 61 litre backpack a great backpack and a wise buy! Care instructions: Clean by hand using lukewarm soapy water and a brush. Use a “waterproofing” spray to renew the water-repellent properties of the fabric, if required. How to pack a rucksack - Put sleeping equipment at the bottom. Position heavy items close to the back. Clothes can be placed all around these. You can put a mattress under the lid and a tent can be fixed underneath the rucksack if there is no room left inside. Use the pockets to store the small accessories you will need during the hike. How to fit a rucksack - Loosen all the straps (shoulder strap, hip belt, tensioners). Wear and carry backpack on your back.
